items.title: A truly underrated gem
items.summary: One of the best rogue like card games with gacha mechanics out there (the devs are extremely generous and give out free stuff constantly). The game is painfully underrated, it needs more players. If you like Slay the Spire or card games in general, please give Morimens a try. The story of this game is top tier too, this game is my top 5 of all time while being free.
items.author: Timberrino25793
